overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis. The player navigates neon-lit streets beneath towering skyscrapers and overhead walkways, crossing intersections with pedestrians and vehicles in a cyberpunk urban environment.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath overhead pedestrian bridges, passing parked vehicles and neon-lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the sidewalk wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: large metal structure spanning the street with illuminated advertisements attached
sleek silver vehicle parked along the red curb
large illuminated screen displaying advertisements on the building facade
tall futuristic building with reflective windows and glowing interior lights
metal barrier separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-slicked avenue beneath massive overhead pedestrian bridges. The camera moves forward along the sidewalk, passing a parked luxury car and orange safety railings. Neon digital billboards illuminate the scene from above, reflecting off the wet pavement. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions beneath the artificial lighting of the cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with palm trees approaching intersection

events.description: approaching intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk markings becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past palm trees and storefronts, approaching a street intersection

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a black umbrella

entered.detail: tall palm tree in a circular concrete planter on the sidewalk
illuminated awning with neon signage over a shop entrance
vertical signal post with glowing green light
illuminated sign reading 'Farrier' suspended over the intersection

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open sidewalk lined with palm trees in concrete planters. The camera approaches a major intersection where a suspended 'Farrier' street sign becomes visible. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk ahead, and storefronts with glowing canopies line the right side. The overhead pedestrian bridge moves closer as the camera advances toward the crosswalk.

events.description: beginning to cross the intersection as traffic light shows green walk signal
white station wagon and red sports car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection with other pedestrians while vehicles pass through

notable_agents.action: white station wagon driving through the crosswalk
red sports car with glowing taillights moving through intersection

entered.detail: bold yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on the wet asphalt
vintage-style white car with dark windows
sleek red vehicle with illuminated red taillights
orange metal railings guiding pedestrian flow at the corner

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide intersection crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes. The 'Farrier' street sign looms large on the right as vehicles including a white station wagon and red sports car drive through the intersection. Pedestrians cross together while the traffic light glows green, and the wet asphalt reflects the surrounding neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street beneath overpass with graffiti walls

events.description: entering covered walkway area beneath building overpass with reduced lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing down the narrower street past graffiti-covered walls and trash bags, moving into a more enclosed urban corridor

entered.detail: opening between tall buildings leading to a darker corridor
concrete structure connecting buildings overhead creating a covered passage
wall covered in colorful spray paint and street art
striped yellow and black metal barrier blocking off an area
black garbage bags piled near the building entrance

segments.scene_description: After crossing the intersection, the camera enters a narrower, more enclosed street beneath a building overpass. The environment shifts to a grittier urban corridor with graffiti-covered walls, yellow barricades, and trash bags along the sidewalk. The lighting becomes more subdued under the overhead structure as the camera continues forward into the cyberpunk alleyway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rain-soaked metropolis, moving from a bright, neon-lit avenue into a gritty, enclosed urban corridor. It begins on a slick sidewalk beneath massive pedestrian bridges, passing luxury cars and orange railings while digital billboards cast vibrant reflections across the wet pavement. As the camera advances, the space opens up into a palm-lined walkway that leads toward a major intersection, where glowing storefront canopies and pedestrians with umbrellas guide the way toward a suspended Farrier street sign. The scene then expands into a wide crosswalk marked with bold yellow stripes, moving through a flow of traffic and pedestrians under the glare of green lights and shimmering asphalt. Finally, the environment shifts as the camera leaves the open intersection and enters a narrower street beneath a building overpass, where the lighting dims and the surroundings transition into a grittier alleyway defined by graffiti-covered walls and yellow barricades.
